'''Elokas''' was one of three habitable [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in the [[Sabrixin system/Legends|Sabrixin system]] in [[Samix sector/Legends|Samix sector]]. It was one of three worlds where crime was controlled by the [[Sabrin Ring]].
